productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Calo Black Flip Flops
description: Need to look stylish when you're hanging out by the pool this summer? Grab these flip flops from adidas in stylish black with a cheeky hint of yellow and enjoy the easy comfort of these hot weather essentials.UpperPadded synthetic straps in a thong-style shapeCutouts on one strap with yellow backing and printed brandingComfortable and hardwearing foam footbedOutsoleLightweight, flexible outsole with texture and grooves to give good grip on wet surfacesFlip flop careUse a cloth to remove dust and dirt
